title: rubroshorea ovalis
intro: Rubroshorea ovalis is a plant species that is also known as the "red-barked coral tree" due to its distinctive red-barked trunk and branches. Traditionally, the plant's bark and leaves have been used in various herbal preparations for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rubroshorea ovalis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
